description: Own Renovate config for the .github repo. The shared org baseline lives in `default.json` (this repo's canonical preset, what every other repo extends via `local>Heey-Global/.github`). This thin file makes .github self-manage its own dependencies (workflow action pins, the inline npm pins in the reusable workflows) by extending that same preset — so the org policy applies to .github too, without duplicating it. Renovate discovers a repo's OWN config from `renovate.json` (NOT `default.json`, which is preset-only), hence the split.
